# discord — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> A fun prank/troll website disguised as a fake Discord Nitro giveaway page. When the user clicks 'Get Free Nitro', a fake hacking animation or scene plays out dramatically, ending with a humorous troll message in Hebrew: 'אכלתה טרולל' (You got trolled). The site is designed purely for laughs and pranking friends.

---

## Pages

### Home
https://discord.zappy5.app
Think you scored free Discord Nitro? Watch the ultimate prank unfold! A hilarious fake hack scene awaits every curious clicker. Share with friends today!

## Legal & Policy

### Privacy Policy
https://discord.zappy5.app/privacy
Information about how user data is collected, stored, and protected.

### Terms & Conditions
https://discord.zappy5.app/terms
Legal terms describing service usage, rights, and policies.

### Accessibility Statement
https://discord.zappy5.app/accessibility
Information about WCAG compliance and accessibility features.

---

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About discord
A fun prank/troll website disguised as a fake Discord Nitro giveaway page. When the user clicks 'Get Free Nitro', a fake hacking animation or scene plays out dramatically, ending with a humorous troll message in Hebrew: 'אכלתה טרולל' (You got trolled). The site is designed purely for laughs and pranking friends.

## Target Audience
- Friends to Prank
- Gaming Community Members
- Internet Memes Enthusiasts

## Industry
entertainment/humor

---

- Robots: https://discord.zappy5.app/robots.txt
- Flattened page text (for LLMs): https://discord.zappy5.app/llms-full.txt
